response.text:

rationale: Your SoC (26%) falls below our minimum sharing threshold (50%), and our household is in critical deadlock at 28% SoC with only 50 minutes autonomy—fulfilling your 0.5 kWh request would trigger cascading blackout; grid reconnection or aggregator intervention is required.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
